summary: CRITICAL: Automated reconnaissance attack detected probing multiple sensitive file paths.
key_findings: A05 Security Misconfiguration probe: 33 requests targeting /.env, /.git/config, /v1/image/
A01 Broken Access Control probe: CSRF attempts on /admin/ without Referer header
recommendations: Add Nginx rate limiting to block rapid 404s. Implement fail2ban to permanently ban the offending IP addressing scanning for sensitive files.
